scene.message: Nanjo: ...You think I wanted{nl} to leave Yamaoka behind!?{waitkey}{ret}
It's an unavoidable choice!{nl} Let's go!{ctl0e:9}{ret}
Mark: What's the call?{nl} Decide now!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: We can't leave her!{nl} Help me{waitkey}{ret}
A demon's roar echoes{nl} from deep in the corridor!{waitkey}{ret}
